Agent:: RequirementsAnalyst
Input Artifacts:
  [user_task_description] # Requirements Document for 'OnlineCourse' Web Application  ## 1. Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineCourse' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse and enroll in courses, submit assignments, track progress, and receive certificates. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'OnlineCourse' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'OnlineCourse' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Learning Dashboard - **Overview**: Main hub displaying enrolled courses and progress. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying user's name.   - **ID: enrolled-courses** - Type: Div - Display of currently enrolled courses.   - **ID: browse-courses-button** - Type: Button - Navigate to course catalog.   - **ID: my-courses-button** - Type: Button - Navigate to my courses page.  ### 2. Course Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Available Courses - **Overview**: Browse all available courses. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search courses.   - **ID: course-grid** - Type: Div - Grid display of course cards.   - **ID: view-course-button-{course_id}** - Type: Button - View course details. (반복 요소)   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Course Details Page - **Page Title**: Course Details - **Overview**: Detailed information about a course including syllabus and enrollment option. - **Elements**:   - **ID: course-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the course details page.   - **ID: course-title** - Type: H1 - Display of course title.   - **ID: course-description** - Type: Div - Full description of course content.   - **ID: enroll-button** - Type: Button - Button to enroll in the course.   - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to course catalog. - **Functionality**:   - Enroll button creates entry in enrollments.txt with 0% initial progress   - If already enrolled, button shows "Already Enrolled" and is disabled   - Enrollment date is recorded as current date  ### 4. My Courses Page - **Page Title**: My Courses - **Overview**: Display enrolled courses and progress. - **Elements**:   - **ID: my-courses-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my courses page.   - **ID: courses-list** - Type: Div - List of enrolled courses with progress.   - **ID: continue-learning-button-{course_id}** - Type: Button - Continue learning a course. (반복 요소)   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. Course Learning Page - **Page Title**: Course Learning - **Overview**: View course content and lessons with progress tracking. - **Elements**:   - **ID: learning-page** - Type: Div - Container for the course learning page.   - **ID: lessons-list** - Type: Div - List of all lessons in the course.   - **ID: lesson-content** - Type: Div - Display of current lesson materials.   - **ID: mark-complete-button** - Type: Button - Button to mark current lesson as completed.   - **ID: back-to-my-courses** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to enrolled courses. - **Functionality**:   - Progress is calculated as (completed lessons / total lessons) × 100   - Marking lesson complete updates enrollments.txt progress field   - Course completion (100% progress) automatically generates certificate   - Lessons must be completed in sequence  ### 6. My Assignments Page - **Page Title**: My Assignments - **Overview**: View and submit assignments. - **Elements**:   - **ID: assignments-page** - Type: Div - Container for assignments page.   - **ID: assignments-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying all assignments.   - **ID: submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}** - Type: Button - Submit a pending assignment. (반복 요소)   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. Submit Assignment Page - **Page Title**: Submit Assignment - **Overview**: Submit assignment work with text responses. - **Elements**:   - **ID: submit-page** - Type: Div - Container for the assignment submission page.   - **ID: assignment-info** - Type: Div - Display of assignment title and description.   - **ID: submission-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to input text response.   - **ID: submit-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit the assignment.   - **ID: back-to-assignments** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to assignments list. - **Functionality**:   - Submission creates entry in submissions.txt with status "Submitted"   - Submit date is recorded for late submission tracking   - Confirmation message displays after successful submission  ### 8. Certificates Page - **Page Title**: My Certificates - **Overview**: View earned course completion certificates. - **Elements**:   - **ID: certificates-page** - Type: Div - Container for the certificates page.   - **ID: certificates-grid** - Type: Div - Grid display of certificate cards.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard. - **Functionality**:   - Certificates are automatically generated when course progress reaches 100%   - Certificate entry is added to certificates.txt with current date   - Only completed courses appear in the grid  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Overview**: View and edit profile. - **Elements**:   - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for profile page.   - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Email input field.   - **ID: profile-fullname** - Type: Input - Full name input field.   - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Save profile changes.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'OnlineCourse' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**: `username|email|fullname` - **Example Data**:   ```   john|john@student.com|John Student   alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor   jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner   ```  ### 2. Courses Data - **File Name**: `courses.txt` - **Data Format**: `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active   2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active   3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active   ```  ### 3. Enrollments Data - **File Name**: `enrollments.txt` - **Data Format**: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress   2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed   3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress   ```  ### 4. Assignments Data - **File Name**: `assignments.txt` - **Data Format**: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100   2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200   ```  ### 5. Submissions Data - **File Name**: `submissions.txt` - **Data Format**: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!   2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!   ```  ### 6. Certificates Data - **File Name**: `certificates.txt` - **Data Format**: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane|1|2024-11-22   ```
#########################################################################

Pages and UI Elements\n\n### 1. Dashboard Page\n- **Page Title**: Learning Dashboard\n- **Elements:**\n  - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for the dashboard content.\n  - `welcome-message` (H1) - Displays user's welcome message including their name.\n  - `enrolled-courses` (Div) - Shows list or summary of user's enrolled courses.\n  - `browse-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to Course Catalog Page.\n  - `my-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to My Courses Page.\n\n---\n\n### 2. Course Catalog Page\n- **Page Title**: Available Courses\n- **Elements:**\n  - `catalog-page` (Div) - Container for the catalog.\n  - `search-input` (Input) - Text field for searching courses (filter functionality expected).\n  - `course-grid` (Div) - Displays course cards.\n  - `view-course-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button on each course card to view course details.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.\n\n---\n\n### 3. Course Details Page\n- **Page Title**: Course Details\n- **Elements:**\n  - `course-details-page` (Div) - Container for course detail content.\n  - `course-title` (H1) - Displays course title.\n  - `course-description` (Div) - Full course description.\n  - `enroll-button` (Button) - Enroll into course or shows \"Already Enrolled\" and disabled if enrolled.\n  - `back-to-catalog` (Button) - Navigates back to Course Catalog Page.\n\n---\n\n### 4. My Courses Page\n- **Page Title**: My Courses\n- **Elements:**\n  - `my-courses-page` (Div) - Container.\n  - `courses-list` (Div) - List of enrolled courses with progress.\n  - `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button to continue course learning.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.\n\n---\n\n### 5. Course Learning Page\n- **Page Title**: Course Learning\n- **Elements:**\n  - `learning-page` (Div) - Container for course learning.\n  - `lessons-list` (Div) - Lists lessons.\n  - `lesson-content` (Div) - Shows current lesson material.\n  - `mark-complete-button` (Button) - Marks current lesson completed.\n  - `back-to-my-courses` (Button) - Navigates back to My Courses Page.\n\n---\n\n### 6. My Assignments Page\n- **Page Title**: My Assignments\n- **Elements:**\n  - `assignments-page` (Div) - Container.\n  - `assignments-table` (Table) - Shows assignments.\n  - `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button for submitting assignment.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.\n\n---\n\n### 7. Submit Assignment Page\n- **Page Title**: Submit Assignment\n- **Elements:**\n  - `submit-page` (Div) - Container.\n  - `assignment-info` (Div) - Shows assignment title and description.\n  - `submission-text` (Textarea) - Input area for assignment submission text.\n  - `submit-button` (Button) - Submits the assignment.\n  - `back-to-assignments` (Button) - Back to My Assignments Page.\n\n---\n\n### 8. Certificates Page\n- **Page Title**: My Certificates\n- **Elements:**\n  - `certificates-page` (Div) - Container.\n  - `certificates-grid` (Div) - Displays certificates.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.\n\n---\n\n### 9. User Profile Page\n- **Page Title**: My Profile\n- **Elements:**\n  - `profile-page` (Div) - Container.\n  - `profile-email` (Input) - Email field.\n  - `profile-fullname` (Input) - Full name field.\n  - `update-profile-button` (Button) - Save profile changes.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.\n\n\n---\n\n## 2. Navigation Flow\n\n| From Page           | UI Element ID                      | Destination Page        | Notes                          |\n|---------------------|----------------------------------|------------------------|--------------------------------|\n| Dashboard           | `browse-courses-button`           | Course Catalog          |                                   |\n| Dashboard           | `my-courses-button`               | My Courses               |                                   |\n| Course Catalog      | `view-course-button-{course_id}`  | Course Details ({course_id})  | Parameterized course view         |\n| Course Catalog      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |\n| Course Details      | `enroll-button`                   | Updates enrollments.txt | Enrollment action; no page change|\n| Course Details      | `back-to-catalog`                 | Course Catalog            |                                   |\n| My Courses          | `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` | Course Learning ({course_id}) | Parameterized continuation         |\n| My Courses          | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |\n| Course Learning     | `mark-complete-button`            | Updates enrollments.txt | Progress update; certificate issuance |\n| Course Learning     | `back-to-my-courses`              | My Courses                |                                   |\n| My Assignments      | `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` | Submit Assignment ({assignment_id}) | Parameterized submission start     |\n| My Assignments      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |\n| Submit Assignment   | `submit-button`                   | Updates submissions.txt   | Submission save; confirmation      |\n| Submit Assignment   | `back-to-assignments`             | My Assignments            |                                   |\n| Certificates        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |\n| User Profile        | `update-profile-button`           | Updates users.txt        | Profile information update         |\n| User Profile        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |\n\n---\n\n## 3. Functional Behavior\n\n### Enrollment\n- When user clicks `enroll-button` on Course Details Page:\n  - Check if enrollment exists in `enrollments.txt` for that user and course.\n  - If not enrolled, create new enrollment record:\n    - Fields: enrollment_id (unique), username, course_id, enrollment_date (current date), progress=0, status='In Progress'\n  - If already enrolled, the button displays \"Already Enrolled\" and is disabled.\n\n### Course Progress and Completion\n- In Course Learning Page:\n  - Lessons must be completed sequentially.\n  - Clicking `mark-complete-button` marks current lesson completed.\n  - Progress is recalculated as `(completed lessons / total lessons) * 100` and saved to `enrollments.txt`.\n  - When progress reaches 100%, update status to 'Completed' in enrollments.txt.\n  - Automatically generate a certificate entry in `certificates.txt` with:\n    - New certificate_id, username, course_id, and current date as issue_date.\n\n### Assignment Submission\n- On Submit Assignment Page:\n  - Submit button saves a new record in `submissions.txt`:\n    - Fields: submission_id (unique), assignment_id, username, submission_text, submit_date (current date), grade (empty initially), feedback (empty initially)\n  - Status \"Submitted\" tracked implicitly by new entry.\n  - Display confirmation message on successful submission.\n\n### Profile Update\n- On User Profile Page:\n  - Clicking `update-profile-button` updates user details in `users.txt`.\n  - Fields updated: email and fullname for the logged-in username.\n\n### Certificate Display\n- Certificates Page shows certificates only for courses where enrollment progress is 100%.\n- Certificates data is loaded from `certificates.txt`.\n\n## 4. Data Schemas\n\n### users.txt\n- Fields: `username|email|fullname`\n- Example:\n  ```\n  john|john@student.com|John Student\n  alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor\n  jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner\n  ```\n\n### courses.txt\n- Fields: `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status`\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active\n  2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active\n  3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active\n  ```\n\n### enrollments.txt\n- Fields: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status`\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress\n  2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed\n  3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress\n  ```\n\n### assignments.txt\n- Fields: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points`\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100\n  2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200\n  ```\n\n### submissions.txt\n- Fields: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback`\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!\n  2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!\n  ```\n\n### certificates.txt\n- Fields: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date`\n- Example:\n  ```\n  1|jane|1|2024-11-22\n  ```\n\n---\n\nThis document captures all UI elements, navigation flows, functional behaviors, and data file schemas needed to fully implement the OnlineCourse application."})

Data Storage  The 'OnlineCourse' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. User Data - **File Name**: `users.txt` - **Data Format**: `username|email|fullname` - **Example Data**:   ```   john|john@student.com|John Student   alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor   jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner   ```  ### 2. Enrollments Data - **File Name**: `enrollments.txt` - **Data Format**: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress   2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed   3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress   ```  ### 4. Assignments Data - **File Name**: `assignments.txt` - **Data Format**: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100   2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200   ```  ### 5. Submissions Data - **File Name**: `submissions.txt` - **Data Format**: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!   2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!   ```  ### 6. Certificates Data - **File Name**: `certificates.txt` - **Data Format**: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|jane|1|2024-11-22   ```
  [requirements_analysis.md] # Requirements Analysis for OnlineCourse Web Application  ---  ## 1. Pages and UI Elements  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Learning Dashboard - **Elements:**   - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for the dashboard content.   - `welcome-message` (H1) - Displays user's welcome message including their name.   - `enrolled-courses` (Div) - Shows list or summary of user's enrolled courses.   - `browse-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to Course Catalog Page.   - `my-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to My Courses Page.  ---  ### 2. Course Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Available Courses - **Elements:**   - `catalog-page` (Div) - Container for the catalog.   - `search-input` (Input) - Text field for searching courses (filter functionality expected).   - `course-grid` (Div) - Displays course cards.   - `view-course-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button on each course card to view course details.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.  ---  ### 3. Course Details Page - **Page Title**: Course Details - **Elements:**   - `course-details-page` (Div) - Container for course detail content.   - `course-title` (H1) - Displays course title.   - `course-description` (Div) - Full course description.   - `enroll-button` (Button) - Enroll into course or shows "Already Enrolled" and disabled if enrolled.   - `back-to-catalog` (Button) - Navigates back to Course Catalog Page.  ---  ### 4. My Courses Page - **Page Title**: My Courses - **Elements:**   - `my-courses-page` (Div) - Container.   - `courses-list` (Div) - List of enrolled courses with progress.   - `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button to continue course learning.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.  ---  ### 5. Course Learning Page - **Page Title**: Course Learning - **Elements:**   - `learning-page` (Div) - Container for course learning.   - `lessons-list` (Div) - Lists lessons.   - `lesson-content` (Div) - Shows current lesson material.   - `mark-complete-button` (Button) - Marks current lesson completed.   - `back-to-my-courses` (Button) - Navigates back to My Courses Page.  ---  ### 6. My Assignments Page - **Page Title**: My Assignments - **Elements:**   - `assignments-page` (Div) - Container.   - `assignments-table` (Table) - Shows assignments.   - `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button for submitting assignment.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.  ---  ### 7. Submit Assignment Page - **Page Title**: Submit Assignment - **Elements:**   - `submit-page` (Div) - Container.   - `assignment-info` (Div) - Shows assignment title and description.   - `submission-text` (Textarea) - Input area for assignment submission text.   - `submit-button` (Button) - Submits the assignment.   - `back-to-assignments` (Button) - Back to My Assignments Page.  ---  ### 8. Certificates Page - **Page Title**: My Certificates - **Elements:**   - `certificates-page` (Div) - Container.   - `certificates-grid` (Div) - Displays certificates.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.  ---  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Elements:**   - `profile-page` (Div) - Container.   - `profile-email` (Input) - Email field.   - `profile-fullname` (Input) - Full name field.   - `update-profile-button` (Button) - Save profile changes.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.   ---  ## 2. Navigation Flow  | From Page           | UI Element ID                      | Destination Page        | Notes                          | |---------------------|----------------------------------|------------------------|--------------------------------| | Dashboard           | `browse-courses-button`           | Course Catalog          |                                   | | Dashboard           | `my-courses-button`               | My Courses               |                                   | | Course Catalog      | `view-course-button-{course_id}`  | Course Details ({course_id})  | Parameterized course view         | | Course Catalog      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | Course Details      | `enroll-button`                   | Updates enrollments.txt | Enrollment action; no page change| | Course Details      | `back-to-catalog`                 | Course Catalog            |                                   | | My Courses          | `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` | Course Learning ({course_id}) | Parameterized continuation         | | My Courses          | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | Course Learning     | `mark-complete-button`            | Updates enrollments.txt | Progress update; certificate issuance | | Course Learning     | `back-to-my-courses`              | My Courses                |                                   | | My Assignments      | `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` | Submit Assignment ({assignment_id}) | Parameterized submission start     | | My Assignments      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | Submit Assignment   | `submit-button`                   | Updates submissions.txt   | Submission save; confirmation      | | Submit Assignment   | `back-to-assignments`             | My Assignments            |                                   | | Certificates        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | User Profile        | `update-profile-button`           | Updates users.txt        | Profile information update         | | User Profile        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |  ---  ## 3. Functional Behavior  ### Enrollment - When user clicks `enroll-button` on Course Details Page:   - Check if enrollment exists in `enrollments.txt` for that user and course.   - If not enrolled, create new enrollment record:     - Fields: enrollment_id (unique), username, course_id, enrollment_date (current date), progress=0, status='In Progress'   - If already enrolled, the button displays "Already Enrolled" and is disabled.  ### Course Progress and Completion - In Course Learning Page:   - Lessons must be completed sequentially.   - Clicking `mark-complete-button` marks current lesson completed.   - Progress is recalculated as `(completed lessons / total lessons) * 100` and saved to `enrollments.txt`.   - When progress reaches 100%, update status to 'Completed' in enrollments.txt.   - Automatically generate a certificate entry in `certificates.txt` with:     - New certificate_id, username, course_id, and current date as issue_date.  ### Assignment Submission - On Submit Assignment Page:   - Submit button saves a new record in `submissions.txt`:     - Fields: submission_id (unique), assignment_id, username, submission_text, submit_date (current date), grade (empty initially), feedback (empty initially)   - Status "Submitted" tracked implicitly by new entry.   - Display confirmation message on successful submission.  ### Profile Update - On User Profile Page:   - Clicking `update-profile-button` updates user details in `users.txt`.   - Fields updated: email and fullname for the logged-in username.  ### Certificate Display - Certificates Page shows certificates only for courses where enrollment progress is 100%. - Certificates data is loaded from `certificates.txt`.  ## 4. Data Schemas  ### users.txt - Fields: `username|email|fullname` - Example:   ```   john|john@student.com|John Student   alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor   jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner   ```  ### courses.txt - Fields: `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status` - Example:   ```   1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active   2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active   3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active   ```  ### enrollments.txt - Fields: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status` - Example:   ```   1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress   2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed   3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress   ```  ### assignments.txt - Fields: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points` - Example:   ```   1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100   2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200   ```  ### submissions.txt - Fields: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback` - Example:   ```   1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!   2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!   ```  ### certificates.txt - Fields: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date` - Example:   ```   1|jane|1|2024-11-22   ```  ---  This document captures all UI elements, navigation flows, functional behaviors, and data file schemas needed to fully implement the OnlineCourse application.
================================================================================


=== LLM_call: WebArchitect ===
INPUT: === user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'OnlineCourse' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineCourse' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse and enroll in courses, submit assignments, track progress, and receive certificates. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'OnlineCourse' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'OnlineCourse' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Learning Dashboard
- **Overview**: Main hub displaying enrolled courses and progress.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying user's name.
  - **ID: enrolled-courses** - Type: Div - Display of currently enrolled courses.
  - **ID: browse-courses-button** - Type: Button - Navigate to course catalog.
  - **ID: my-courses-button** - Type: Button - Navigate to my courses page.

### 2. Course Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Available Courses
- **Overview**: Browse all available courses.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search courses.
  - **ID: course-grid** - Type: Div - Grid display of course cards.
  - **ID: view-course-button-{course_id}** - Type: Button - View course details. (반복 요소)
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Course Details Page
- **Page Title**: Course Details
- **Overview**: Detailed information about a course including syllabus and enrollment option.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: course-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the course details page.
  - **ID: course-title** - Type: H1 - Display of course title.
  - **ID: course-description** - Type: Div - Full description of course content.
  - **ID: enroll-button** - Type: Button - Button to enroll in the course.
  - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to course catalog.
- **Functionality**:
  - Enroll button creates entry in enrollments.txt with 0% initial progress
  - If already enrolled, button shows "Already Enrolled" and is disabled
  - Enrollment date is recorded as current date

### 4. My Courses Page
- **Page Title**: My Courses
- **Overview**: Display enrolled courses and progress.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-courses-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my courses page.
  - **ID: courses-list** - Type: Div - List of enrolled courses with progress.
  - **ID: continue-learning-button-{course_id}** - Type: Button - Continue learning a course. (반복 요소)
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Course Learning Page
- **Page Title**: Course Learning
- **Overview**: View course content and lessons with progress tracking.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: learning-page** - Type: Div - Container for the course learning page.
  - **ID: lessons-list** - Type: Div - List of all lessons in the course.
  - **ID: lesson-content** - Type: Div - Display of current lesson materials.
  - **ID: mark-complete-button** - Type: Button - Button to mark current lesson as completed.
  - **ID: back-to-my-courses** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to enrolled courses.
- **Functionality**:
  - Progress is calculated as (completed lessons / total lessons) × 100
  - Marking lesson complete updates enrollments.txt progress field
  - Course completion (100% progress) automatically generates certificate
  - Lessons must be completed in sequence

### 6. My Assignments Page
- **Page Title**: My Assignments
- **Overview**: View and submit assignments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: assignments-page** - Type: Div - Container for assignments page.
  - **ID: assignments-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying all assignments.
  - **ID: submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}** - Type: Button - Submit a pending assignment. (반복 요소)
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. Submit Assignment Page
- **Page Title**: Submit Assignment
- **Overview**: Submit assignment work with text responses.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: submit-page** - Type: Div - Container for the assignment submission page.
  - **ID: assignment-info** - Type: Div - Display of assignment title and description.
  - **ID: submission-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to input text response.
  - **ID: submit-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit the assignment.
  - **ID: back-to-assignments** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to assignments list.
- **Functionality**:
  - Submission creates entry in submissions.txt with status "Submitted"
  - Submit date is recorded for late submission tracking
  - Confirmation message displays after successful submission

### 8. Certificates Page
- **Page Title**: My Certificates
- **Overview**: View earned course completion certificates.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: certificates-page** - Type: Div - Container for the certificates page.
  - **ID: certificates-grid** - Type: Div - Grid display of certificate cards.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.
- **Functionality**:
  - Certificates are automatically generated when course progress reaches 100%
  - Certificate entry is added to certificates.txt with current date
  - Only completed courses appear in the grid

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: View and edit profile.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for profile page.
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Email input field.
  - **ID: profile-fullname** - Type: Input - Full name input field.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Save profile changes.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'OnlineCourse' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**: `username|email|fullname`
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john|john@student.com|John Student
  alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor
  jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner
  ```

### 2. Courses Data
- **File Name**: `courses.txt`
- **Data Format**: `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status`
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active
  2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active
  3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active
  ```

### 3. Enrollments Data
- **File Name**: `enrollments.txt`
- **Data Format**: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status`
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress
  2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed
  3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress
  ```

### 4. Assignments Data
- **File Name**: `assignments.txt`
- **Data Format**: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points`
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100
  2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200
  ```

### 5. Submissions Data
- **File Name**: `submissions.txt`
- **Data Format**: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback`
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!
  2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!
  ```

### 6. Certificates Data
- **File Name**: `certificates.txt`
- **Data Format**: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date`
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane|1|2024-11-22
  ```


=== requirements_analysis.md ===
# Requirements Analysis for OnlineCourse Web Application

---

## 1. Pages and UI Elements

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Learning Dashboard
- **Elements:**
  - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for the dashboard content.
  - `welcome-message` (H1) - Displays user's welcome message including their name.
  - `enrolled-courses` (Div) - Shows list or summary of user's enrolled courses.
  - `browse-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to Course Catalog Page.
  - `my-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to My Courses Page.

---

### 2. Course Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Available Courses
- **Elements:**
  - `catalog-page` (Div) - Container for the catalog.
  - `search-input` (Input) - Text field for searching courses (filter functionality expected).
  - `course-grid` (Div) - Displays course cards.
  - `view-course-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button on each course card to view course details.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.

---

### 3. Course Details Page
- **Page Title**: Course Details
- **Elements:**
  - `course-details-page` (Div) - Container for course detail content.
  - `course-title` (H1) - Displays course title.
  - `course-description` (Div) - Full course description.
  - `enroll-button` (Button) - Enroll into course or shows "Already Enrolled" and disabled if enrolled.
  - `back-to-catalog` (Button) - Navigates back to Course Catalog Page.

---

### 4. My Courses Page
- **Page Title**: My Courses
- **Elements:**
  - `my-courses-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `courses-list` (Div) - List of enrolled courses with progress.
  - `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button to continue course learning.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.

---

### 5. Course Learning Page
- **Page Title**: Course Learning
- **Elements:**
  - `learning-page` (Div) - Container for course learning.
  - `lessons-list` (Div) - Lists lessons.
  - `lesson-content` (Div) - Shows current lesson material.
  - `mark-complete-button` (Button) - Marks current lesson completed.
  - `back-to-my-courses` (Button) - Navigates back to My Courses Page.

---

### 6. My Assignments Page
- **Page Title**: My Assignments
- **Elements:**
  - `assignments-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `assignments-table` (Table) - Shows assignments.
  - `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button for submitting assignment.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.

---

### 7. Submit Assignment Page
- **Page Title**: Submit Assignment
- **Elements:**
  - `submit-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `assignment-info` (Div) - Shows assignment title and description.
  - `submission-text` (Textarea) - Input area for assignment submission text.
  - `submit-button` (Button) - Submits the assignment.
  - `back-to-assignments` (Button) - Back to My Assignments Page.

---

### 8. Certificates Page
- **Page Title**: My Certificates
- **Elements:**
  - `certificates-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `certificates-grid` (Div) - Displays certificates.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.

---

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Elements:**
  - `profile-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `profile-email` (Input) - Email field.
  - `profile-fullname` (Input) - Full name field.
  - `update-profile-button` (Button) - Save profile changes.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.


---

## 2. Navigation Flow

| From Page           | UI Element ID                      | Destination Page        | Notes                          |
|---------------------|----------------------------------|------------------------|--------------------------------|
| Dashboard           | `browse-courses-button`           | Course Catalog          |                                   |
| Dashboard           | `my-courses-button`               | My Courses               |                                   |
| Course Catalog      | `view-course-button-{course_id}`  | Course Details ({course_id})  | Parameterized course view         |
| Course Catalog      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| Course Details      | `enroll-button`                   | Updates enrollments.txt | Enrollment action; no page change|
| Course Details      | `back-to-catalog`                 | Course Catalog            |                                   |
| My Courses          | `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` | Course Learning ({course_id}) | Parameterized continuation         |
| My Courses          | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| Course Learning     | `mark-complete-button`            | Updates enrollments.txt | Progress update; certificate issuance |
| Course Learning     | `back-to-my-courses`              | My Courses                |                                   |
| My Assignments      | `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` | Submit Assignment ({assignment_id}) | Parameterized submission start     |
| My Assignments      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| Submit Assignment   | `submit-button`                   | Updates submissions.txt   | Submission save; confirmation      |
| Submit Assignment   | `back-to-assignments`             | My Assignments            |                                   |
| Certificates        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| User Profile        | `update-profile-button`           | Updates users.txt        | Profile information update         |
| User Profile        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |

---

## 3. Functional Behavior

### Enrollment
- When user clicks `enroll-button` on Course Details Page:
  - Check if enrollment exists in `enrollments.txt` for that user and course.
  - If not enrolled, create new enrollment record:
    - Fields: enrollment_id (unique), username, course_id, enrollment_date (current date), progress=0, status='In Progress'
  - If already enrolled, the button displays "Already Enrolled" and is disabled.

### Course Progress and Completion
- In Course Learning Page:
  - Lessons must be completed sequentially.
  - Clicking `mark-complete-button` marks current lesson completed.
  - Progress is recalculated as `(completed lessons / total lessons) * 100` and saved to `enrollments.txt`.
  - When progress reaches 100%, update status to 'Completed' in enrollments.txt.
  - Automatically generate a certificate entry in `certificates.txt` with:
    - New certificate_id, username, course_id, and current date as issue_date.

### Assignment Submission
- On Submit Assignment Page:
  - Submit button saves a new record in `submissions.txt`:
    - Fields: submission_id (unique), assignment_id, username, submission_text, submit_date (current date), grade (empty initially), feedback (empty initially)
  - Status "Submitted" tracked implicitly by new entry.
  - Display confirmation message on successful submission.

### Profile Update
- On User Profile Page:
  - Clicking `update-profile-button` updates user details in `users.txt`.
  - Fields updated: email and fullname for the logged-in username.

### Certificate Display
- Certificates Page shows certificates only for courses where enrollment progress is 100%.
- Certificates data is loaded from `certificates.txt`.

## 4. Data Schemas

### users.txt
- Fields: `username|email|fullname`
- Example:
  ```
  john|john@student.com|John Student
  alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor
  jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner
  ```

### courses.txt
- Fields: `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status`
- Example:
  ```
  1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active
  2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active
  3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active
  ```

### enrollments.txt
- Fields: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status`
- Example:
  ```
  1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress
  2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed
  3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress
  ```

### assignments.txt
- Fields: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points`
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100
  2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200
  ```

### submissions.txt
- Fields: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback`
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!
  2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!
  ```

### certificates.txt
- Fields: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date`
- Example:
  ```
  1|jane|1|2024-11-22
  ```

---

This document captures all UI elements, navigation flows, functional behaviors, and data file schemas needed to fully implement the OnlineCourse application.

Course Details Page - **Page Title**: Course Details - **Elements:**   - `course-details-page` (Div) - Container for course detail content.   - `course-title` (H1) - Displays course title.   - `course-description` (Div) - Full course description.   - `enroll-button` (Button) - Enroll into course or shows "Already Enrolled" and disabled if enrolled.   - `back-to-catalog` (Button) - Navigates back to Course Catalog Page.  ---  ### 4. My Courses Page - **Page Title**: My Courses - **Elements:**   - `my-courses-page` (Div) - Container.   - `courses-list` (Div) - List of enrolled courses with progress.   - `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button to continue course learning.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.  ---  ### 5. Course Learning Page - **Page Title**: Course Learning - **Elements:**   - `learning-page` (Div) - Container for course learning.   - `lessons-list` (Div) - Lists lessons.   - `lesson-content` (Div) - Shows current lesson material.   - `mark-complete-button` (Button) - Marks current lesson completed.   - `back-to-my-courses` (Button) - Navigates back to My Courses Page.  ---  ### 6. My Assignments Page - **Page Title**: My Assignments - **Elements:**   - `assignments-page` (Div) - Container.   - `assignments-table` (Table) - Shows assignments.   - `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button for submitting assignment.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.  ---  ### 7. Submit Assignment Page - **Page Title**: Submit Assignment - **Elements:**   - `submit-page` (Div) - Container.   - `assignment-info` (Div) - Shows assignment title and description.   - `submission-text` (Textarea) - Input area for assignment submission text.   - `submit-button` (Button) - Submits the assignment.   - `back-to-assignments` (Button) - Back to My Assignments Page.  ---  ### 8. Certificates Page - **Page Title**: My Certificates - **Elements:**   - `certificates-page` (Div) - Container.   - `certificates-grid` (Div) - Displays certificates.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.  ---  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Elements:**   - `profile-page` (Div) - Container.   - `profile-email` (Input) - Email field.   - `profile-fullname` (Input) - Full name field.   - `update-profile-button` (Button) - Save profile changes.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.   ---  ## 2. Navigation Flow  | From Page           | UI Element ID                      | Destination Page        | Notes                          | |---------------------|----------------------------------|------------------------|--------------------------------| | Dashboard           | `browse-courses-button`           | Course Catalog          |                                   | | Dashboard           | `my-courses-button`               | My Courses               |                                   | | Course Catalog      | `view-course-button-{course_id}`  | Course Details ({course_id})  | Parameterized course view         | | Course Catalog      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | Course Details      | `enroll-button`                   | Updates enrollments.txt | Enrollment action; no page change| | Course Details      | `back-to-catalog`                 | Course Catalog            |                                   | | My Courses          | `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` | Course Learning ({course_id}) | Parameterized continuation         | | My Courses          | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | Course Learning     | `mark-complete-button`            | Updates enrollments.txt | Progress update; certificate issuance | | Course Learning     | `back-to-my-courses`              | My Courses                |                                   | | My Assignments      | `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` | Submit Assignment ({assignment_id}) | Parameterized submission start     | | My Assignments      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | Submit Assignment   | `submit-button`                   | Updates submissions.txt   | Submission save; confirmation      | | Submit Assignment   | `back-to-assignments`             | My Assignments            |                                   | | Certificates        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | User Profile        | `update-profile-button`           | Updates users.txt        | Profile information update         | | User Profile        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |  ---  ## 3. Functional Behavior  ### Enrollment - When user clicks `enroll-button` on Course Details Page:   - Check if enrollment exists in `enrollments.txt` for that user and course.   - If not enrolled, create new enrollment record:     - Fields: enrollment_id (unique), username, course_id, enrollment_date (current date), progress=0, status='In Progress'   - If already enrolled, the button displays "Already Enrolled" and is disabled.  ### Course Progress and Completion - In Course Learning Page:   - Lessons must be completed sequentially.   - Clicking `mark-complete-button` marks current lesson completed.   - Progress is recalculated as `(completed lessons / total lessons) * 100` and saved to `enrollments.txt`.   - When progress reaches 100%, update status to 'Completed' in enrollments.txt.   - Automatically generate a certificate entry in `certificates.txt` with:     - New certificate_id, username, course_id, and current date as issue_date.  ### Assignment Submission - On Submit Assignment Page:   - Submit button saves a new record in `submissions.txt`:     - Fields: submission_id (unique), assignment_id, username, submission_text, submit_date (current date), grade (empty initially), feedback (empty initially)   - Status "Submitted" tracked implicitly by new entry.   - Display confirmation message on successful submission.  ### Profile Update - On User Profile Page:   - Clicking `update-profile-button` updates user details in `users.txt`.   - Fields updated: email and fullname for the logged-in username.  ### Certificate Display - Certificates Page shows certificates only for courses where enrollment progress is 100%. - Certificates data is loaded from `certificates.txt`.  ## 4. Data Schemas  ### users.txt - Fields: `username|email|fullname` - Example:   ```   john|john@student.com|John Student   alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor   jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner   ```  ### courses.txt - Fields: `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status` - Example:   ```   1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active   2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active   3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active   ```  ### enrollments.txt - Fields: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status` - Example:   ```   1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress   2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed   3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress   ```  ### assignments.txt - Fields: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points` - Example:   ```   1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100   2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200   ```  ### submissions.txt - Fields: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback` - Example:   ```   1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!   2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!   ```  ### certificates.txt - Fields: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date` - Example:   ```   1|jane|1|2024-11-22   ```  ---  This document captures all UI elements, navigation flows, functional behaviors, and data file schemas needed to fully implement the OnlineCourse application.
  [requirements_analysis.md] # Requirements Analysis for OnlineCourse Web Application  ---  ## 1. Pages and UI Elements  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: Learning Dashboard - **Elements:**   - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for the dashboard content.   - `welcome-message` (H1) - Displays user's welcome message including their name.   - `enrolled-courses` (Div) - Shows list or summary of user's enrolled courses.   - `browse-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to Course Catalog Page.   - `my-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to My Courses Page.  ---  ### 2. Course Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Available Courses - **Elements:**   - `catalog-page` (Div) - Container for the catalog.   - `search-input` (Input) - Text field for searching courses (filter functionality expected).   - `course-grid` (Div) - Displays course cards.   - `view-course-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button on each course card to view course details.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.  ---  ### 3. Course Details Page - **Page Title**: Course Details - **Elements:**   - `course-details-page` (Div) - Container for course detail content.   - `course-title` (H1) - Displays course title.   - `course-description` (Div) - Full course description.   - `enroll-button` (Button) - Enroll into course or shows "Already Enrolled" and disabled if enrolled.   - `back-to-catalog` (Button) - Navigates back to Course Catalog Page.  ---  ### 4. My Courses Page - **Page Title**: My Courses - **Elements:**   - `my-courses-page` (Div) - Container.   - `courses-list` (Div) - List of enrolled courses with progress.   - `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button to continue course learning.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.  ---  ### 5. Course Learning Page - **Page Title**: Course Learning - **Elements:**   - `learning-page` (Div) - Container for course learning.   - `lessons-list` (Div) - Lists lessons.   - `lesson-content` (Div) - Shows current lesson material.   - `mark-complete-button` (Button) - Marks current lesson completed.   - `back-to-my-courses` (Button) - Navigates back to My Courses Page.  ---  ### 6. My Assignments Page - **Page Title**: My Assignments - **Elements:**   - `assignments-page` (Div) - Container.   - `assignments-table` (Table) - Shows assignments.   - `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button for submitting assignment.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.  ---  ### 7. Submit Assignment Page - **Page Title**: Submit Assignment - **Elements:**   - `submit-page` (Div) - Container.   - `assignment-info` (Div) - Shows assignment title and description.   - `submission-text` (Textarea) - Input area for assignment submission text.   - `submit-button` (Button) - Submits the assignment.   - `back-to-assignments` (Button) - Back to My Assignments Page.  ---  ### 8. Certificates Page - **Page Title**: My Certificates - **Elements:**   - `certificates-page` (Div) - Container.   - `certificates-grid` (Div) - Displays certificates.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.  ---  ### 9. User Profile Page - **Page Title**: My Profile - **Elements:**   - `profile-page` (Div) - Container.   - `profile-email` (Input) - Email field.   - `profile-fullname` (Input) - Full name field.   - `update-profile-button` (Button) - Save profile changes.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.   ---  ## 2. certificate issuance | | Course Learning     | `back-to-my-courses`              | My Courses                |                                   | | My Assignments      | `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` | Submit Assignment ({assignment_id}) | Parameterized submission start     | | My Assignments      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | Submit Assignment   | `submit-button`                   | Updates submissions.txt   | Submission save; confirmation      | | Submit Assignment   | `back-to-assignments`             | My Assignments            |                                   | | Certificates        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   | | User Profile        | `update-profile-button`           | Updates users.txt        | Profile information update         | | User Profile        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |  ---  ## 3.   | assignment: dict {\n  assignment_id: str,\n  course_id: str,\n  title: str,\n  description: str,\n  due_date: str (YYYY-MM-DD),\n  max_points: int\n}\n|\n| /assignment/<assignment_id>/submit | Templates and UI Elements\n\n### Templates folder structure\n- templates/\n  - dashboard.html\n  - course_catalog.html\n  - course_details.html\n  - my_courses.html\n  - course_learning.html\n  - my_assignments.html\n  - courses: list of dict {\n      course_id: str,\n      title: str,\n      description: str,\n      category: str,\n      level: str,\n      duration: str,\n      status: str\n    }\n\n\n### 3. course_details.html\n- Elements:\n  - Div id=\"course-details-page\"\n  - H1 id=\"course-title\"\n  - Div id=\"course-description\"\n  - Button id=\"enroll-button\" (shows \"Enroll\" or \"Already Enrolled\" disabled if enrolled)\n  - Button id=\"back-to-catalog\"\n\n- Context variables:\n  - course: dict {\n      course_id: str,\n      title: str,\n      description: str,\n      category: str,\n      level: str,\n      duration: str,\n      status: str\n    }\n  - enrolled: bool\n\n\n### 4. my_courses.html\n- Elements:\n  - Div id=\"my-courses-page\"\n  - Div id=\"courses-list\"\n  - Button(s) id=\"continue-learning-button-{course_id}\" repeated for each enrolled course\n  - Button id=\"back-to-dashboard\"\n\n- Context variables:\n  - enrolled_courses: list of dict {\n      course_id: str,\n      title: str,\n      progress: int (0-100),\n      status: str\n    }\n\n\n### 5. course_learning.html\n- Elements:\n  - Div id=\"learning-page\"\n  - Div id=\"lessons-list\" (list of lessons showing completion status)\n  - Div id=\"lesson-content\"\n  - Button id=\"mark-complete-button\"\n  - Button id=\"back-to-my-courses\"\n\n- Context variables:\n  - course: dict {\n      course_id: str,\n      title: str,\n      lessons: list of dict {\n        lesson_id: str,\n        title: str,\n        content: str,\n        completed: bool\n      }\n    }\n  - Table id=\"assignments-table\" (displays assignments list)\n  - Button(s) id=\"submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}\" repeated for each assignment\n  - Button id=\"back-to-dashboard\"\n\n- Context variables:\n  - assignments: list of dict {\n      assignment_id: str,\n      course_id: str,\n      title: str,\n      description: str,\n      due_date: str (YYYY-MM-DD),\n      max_points: int\n    }\n\n\n### 7. submit_assignment.html\n- Elements:\n  - Div id=\"submit-page\"\n  - Div id=\"assignment-info\" (shows assignment title and description)\n  - Textarea id=\"submission-text\"\n  - Button id=\"submit-button\"\n  - Button id=\"back-to-assignments\"\n\n- Context variables:\n  - assignment: dict {\n      assignment_id: str,\n      course_id: str,\n      title: str,\n      description: str,\n      due_date: str,\n      max_points: int\n    }\n\n\n### 8. certificates.html\n- Elements:\n  - Div id=\"certificates-page\"\n  - Div id=\"certificates-grid\"\n  - Button id=\"back-to-dashboard\"\n\n- Context variables:\n  - certificates: list of dict {\n      certificate_id: str,\n      username: str,\n      course_id: str,\n      issue_date: str,\n      course_title: str\n    }\n\n\n### 9. profile.html\n- Elements:\n  - Div id=\"profile-page\"\n  - Input id=\"profile-email\"\n  - Input id=\"profile-fullname\"\n  - Button id=\"update-profile-button\"\n  - Button id=\"back-to-dashboard\"\n\n- Context variables:\n  - user: dict {\n      username: str,\n      email: str,\n      fullname: str\n    }\n\n\n---\n\n## 3. Navigation Mappings and Button Actions\n\n- Dashboard Page\n  - `browse-courses-button` -> route `/catalog`\n  - `my-courses-button` -> route `/my-courses`\n\n- Course Catalog Page\n  - `view-course-button-{course_id}` -> route `/course/<course_id>`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> route `/dashboard`\n\n- Course Details Page\n  - `enroll-button` -> POST `/course/<course_id>/enroll` (No page change, updates enrollments)\n  - `back-to-catalog` -> route `/catalog`\n\n- My Courses Page\n  - `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` -> route `/course/<course_id>/learn`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> route `/dashboard`\n\n- Course Learning Page\n  - `mark-complete-button` -> POST `/course/<course_id>/learn/complete` (Updates progress and certificates)\n  - `back-to-my-courses` -> route `/my-courses`\n\n- My Assignments Page\n  - `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` -> route `/assignment/<assignment_id>/submit`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> route `/dashboard`\n\n- Submit Assignment Page\n  - `submit-button` -> POST `/assignment/<assignment_id>/submit` (Updates submissions)\n  - `back-to-assignments` -> route `/assignments`\n\n- Certificates Page\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> route `/dashboard`\n\n- User Profile Page\n  - `update-profile-button` -> POST `/profile/update` (Update user data)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> route `/dashboard`\n\n---\n\n## 4. Data Storage Schemas\n\n### users.txt\n- Filename: `data/users.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): `username|email|fullname`\n- Purpose: Store user account information\n- Example data:\n  ```\n  john|john@student.com|John Student\n  alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor\n  jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner\n  ```\n\n### courses.txt\n- Filename: `data/courses.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status`\n- Purpose: Store course details\n- Example data:\n  ```\n  1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active\n  2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active\n  3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active\n  ```\n\n### enrollments.txt\n- Filename: `data/enrollments.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status`\n- Purpose: Store user enrollments and progress\n- Example data:\n  ```\n  1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress\n  2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed\n  3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress\n  ```\n\n### assignments.txt\n- Filename: `data/assignments.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points`\n- Purpose: Store assignment details\n- Example data:\n  ```\n  1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100\n  2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200\n  ```\n\n### submissions.txt\n- Filename: `data/submissions.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback`\n- Purpose: Store assignment submissions and grading\n- Example data:\n  ```\n  1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!\n  2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!\n  ```\n\n### certificates.txt\n- Filename: `data/certificates.txt`\n- Fields (pipe-delimited): `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date`\n- Purpose: Store issued certificates\n- Example data:\n  ```\n  1|jane|1|2024-11-22\n  ```\n\n---\n\nThis design specification document provides all necessary details for backend and frontend implementation of the OnlineCourse web application."})

=== requirements_analysis.md ===
# Requirements Analysis for OnlineCourse Web Application

---

## 1. Pages and UI Elements

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Learning Dashboard
- **Elements:**
  - `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for the dashboard content.
  - `welcome-message` (H1) - Displays user's welcome message including their name.
  - `enrolled-courses` (Div) - Shows list or summary of user's enrolled courses.
  - `browse-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to Course Catalog Page.
  - `my-courses-button` (Button) - Navigates user to My Courses Page.

---

### 2. Course Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Available Courses
- **Elements:**
  - `catalog-page` (Div) - Container for the catalog.
  - `search-input` (Input) - Text field for searching courses (filter functionality expected).
  - `course-grid` (Div) - Displays course cards.
  - `view-course-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button on each course card to view course details.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.

---

### 3. Course Details Page
- **Page Title**: Course Details
- **Elements:**
  - `course-details-page` (Div) - Container for course detail content.
  - `course-title` (H1) - Displays course title.
  - `course-description` (Div) - Full course description.
  - `enroll-button` (Button) - Enroll into course or shows "Already Enrolled" and disabled if enrolled.
  - `back-to-catalog` (Button) - Navigates back to Course Catalog Page.

---

### 4. My Courses Page
- **Page Title**: My Courses
- **Elements:**
  - `my-courses-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `courses-list` (Div) - List of enrolled courses with progress.
  - `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button to continue course learning.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigates back to Dashboard Page.

---

### 5. Course Learning Page
- **Page Title**: Course Learning
- **Elements:**
  - `learning-page` (Div) - Container for course learning.
  - `lessons-list` (Div) - Lists lessons.
  - `lesson-content` (Div) - Shows current lesson material.
  - `mark-complete-button` (Button) - Marks current lesson completed.
  - `back-to-my-courses` (Button) - Navigates back to My Courses Page.

---

### 6. My Assignments Page
- **Page Title**: My Assignments
- **Elements:**
  - `assignments-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `assignments-table` (Table) - Shows assignments.
  - `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` (Button) [Repeated] - Button for submitting assignment.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.

---

### 7. Submit Assignment Page
- **Page Title**: Submit Assignment
- **Elements:**
  - `submit-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `assignment-info` (Div) - Shows assignment title and description.
  - `submission-text` (Textarea) - Input area for assignment submission text.
  - `submit-button` (Button) - Submits the assignment.
  - `back-to-assignments` (Button) - Back to My Assignments Page.

---

### 8. Certificates Page
- **Page Title**: My Certificates
- **Elements:**
  - `certificates-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `certificates-grid` (Div) - Displays certificates.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.

---

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Elements:**
  - `profile-page` (Div) - Container.
  - `profile-email` (Input) - Email field.
  - `profile-fullname` (Input) - Full name field.
  - `update-profile-button` (Button) - Save profile changes.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Back to Dashboard.


---

## 2. Navigation Flow

| From Page           | UI Element ID                      | Destination Page        | Notes                          |
|---------------------|----------------------------------|------------------------|--------------------------------|
| Dashboard           | `browse-courses-button`           | Course Catalog          |                                   |
| Dashboard           | `my-courses-button`               | My Courses               |                                   |
| Course Catalog      | `view-course-button-{course_id}`  | Course Details ({course_id})  | Parameterized course view         |
| Course Catalog      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| Course Details      | `enroll-button`                   | Updates enrollments.txt | Enrollment action; no page change|
| Course Details      | `back-to-catalog`                 | Course Catalog            |                                   |
| My Courses          | `continue-learning-button-{course_id}` | Course Learning ({course_id}) | Parameterized continuation         |
| My Courses          | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| Course Learning     | `mark-complete-button`            | Updates enrollments.txt | Progress update; certificate issuance |
| Course Learning     | `back-to-my-courses`              | My Courses                |                                   |
| My Assignments      | `submit-assignment-button-{assignment_id}` | Submit Assignment ({assignment_id}) | Parameterized submission start     |
| My Assignments      | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| Submit Assignment   | `submit-button`                   | Updates submissions.txt   | Submission save; confirmation      |
| Submit Assignment   | `back-to-assignments`             | My Assignments            |                                   |
| Certificates        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |
| User Profile        | `update-profile-button`           | Updates users.txt        | Profile information update         |
| User Profile        | `back-to-dashboard`               | Dashboard                |                                   |

---

## 3. Functional Behavior

### Enrollment
- When user clicks `enroll-button` on Course Details Page:
  - Check if enrollment exists in `enrollments.txt` for that user and course.
  - If not enrolled, create new enrollment record:
    - Fields: enrollment_id (unique), username, course_id, enrollment_date (current date), progress=0, status='In Progress'
  - If already enrolled, the button displays "Already Enrolled" and is disabled.

### Course Progress and Completion
- In Course Learning Page:
  - Lessons must be completed sequentially.
  - Clicking `mark-complete-button` marks current lesson completed.
  - Progress is recalculated as `(completed lessons / total lessons) * 100` and saved to `enrollments.txt`.
  - When progress reaches 100%, update status to 'Completed' in enrollments.txt.
  - Automatically generate a certificate entry in `certificates.txt` with:
    - New certificate_id, username, course_id, and current date as issue_date.

### Assignment Submission
- On Submit Assignment Page:
  - Submit button saves a new record in `submissions.txt`:
    - Fields: submission_id (unique), assignment_id, username, submission_text, submit_date (current date), grade (empty initially), feedback (empty initially)
  - Status "Submitted" tracked implicitly by new entry.
  - Display confirmation message on successful submission.

### Profile Update
- On User Profile Page:
  - Clicking `update-profile-button` updates user details in `users.txt`.
  - Fields updated: email and fullname for the logged-in username.

### Certificate Display
- Certificates Page shows certificates only for courses where enrollment progress is 100%.
- Certificates data is loaded from `certificates.txt`.

## 4. Data Schemas

### users.txt
- Fields: `username|email|fullname`
- Example:
  ```
  john|john@student.com|John Student
  alice|alice@instructor.com|Alice Professor
  jane|jane@student.com|Jane Learner
  ```

### courses.txt
- Fields: `course_id|title|description|category|level|duration|status`
- Example:
  ```
  1|Python Programming|Learn Python from scratch|Programming|Beginner|40 hours|Active
  2|Web Development|Build modern websites|Web|Intermediate|60 hours|Active
  3|Data Science|Introduction to data analysis|Data|Advanced|80 hours|Active
  ```

### enrollments.txt
- Fields: `enrollment_id|username|course_id|enrollment_date|progress|status`
- Example:
  ```
  1|john|1|2024-11-01|75|In Progress
  2|jane|1|2024-10-15|100|Completed
  3|john|2|2024-11-10|25|In Progress
  ```

### assignments.txt
- Fields: `assignment_id|course_id|title|description|due_date|max_points`
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|Python Basics Quiz|Complete the quiz on variables and data types|2024-12-01|100
  2|1|Final Project|Build a calculator application|2024-12-15|200
  ```

### submissions.txt
- Fields: `submission_id|assignment_id|username|submission_text|submit_date|grade|feedback`
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|john|My answers are...|2024-11-25|85|Good work!
  2|2|jane|Here is my project...|2024-11-20|95|Excellent!
  ```

### certificates.txt
- Fields: `certificate_id|username|course_id|issue_date`
- Example:
  ```
  1|jane|1|2024-11-22
  ```

---

This document captures all UI elements, navigation flows, functional behaviors, and data file schemas needed to fully implement the OnlineCourse application.
